# Impactable

> Impactable is the B2B Demand Intelligence System. We are a certified LinkedIn Marketing Partner that engineers the account list before a dollar is spent, discovers who a company's buyers actually are from real engagement data, and proves revenue with a continuous quarterly diagnostic. Not clicks. Not leads. Named accounts moving toward a decision, and revenue traced back to them.

Impactable is a B2B marketing agency founded and led by Justin Rowe. LinkedIn named Impactable to the first cohort of its certified agencies and named Justin Rowe "Thought Leader of the Year" at the 2026 LinkedIn Indie Agency Awards.

## What Impactable does
- B2B LinkedIn Ads (strategy, launch, and managed scaling)
- B2B paid search (Google Ads), run as one connected system with LinkedIn
- B2B thought-leadership content via the Brand Engine (a living AI context environment trained on a client's expertise and voice)
- The full marketing ecosystem: organic, paid, and nurture run as one compounding system
- Productized diagnostics: the free Competitor Intel Report, the Impact Report, and the Foundational Strategy

## Proof
- $50M+ in B2B ad spend managed
- Lacework: 6X ROI, published by LinkedIn as a customer story
- HeyReach: 20x ROAS
- Certified LinkedIn Marketing Partner; LinkedIn 2026 Thought Leader of the Year

## Core pages
- [Home](https://impactable.marketing/): The B2B Demand Intelligence System, and how every channel runs as one connected system.
- [LinkedIn Ads for new advertisers](https://impactable.marketing/linkedin-launch): Launch LinkedIn on a validated system, starting with a $1,500 Foundational Strategy.
- [LinkedIn Ads for existing advertisers](https://impactable.marketing/linkedin-scale): Diagnose waste and scale a full-funnel account, starting with a $1,500 Impact Report.
- [B2B paid search](https://impactable.marketing/google): Google and LinkedIn run as one closed attribution loop.
- [Thought leadership / Brand Engine](https://impactable.marketing/thought-leadership): Founder-led content produced from a living AI context environment.
- [The marketing ecosystem](https://impactable.marketing/marketing-ecosystem): How founder content, paid search, LinkedIn, and nurture compound together.
- [Pricing](https://impactable.marketing/pricing): The climbing offer ladder, from a free scorecard to full ecosystem management.
- [Free Competitor Intel Report](https://impactable.marketing/competitor-intel-report): What your competitors run on LinkedIn and the audience lanes they leave open.
